name: EXP4: SOTA Base + 4-Phase TTT
blurb: SOTA-base 4-phase TTT using the verified exp4 pod run. Local measurements had a +0.00508 bpb inflation, so the corrected 3-seed mean is approximately 1.06071, below the current SOTA 1.06108. Regenerate this file from the exact pod logs with the bundled script before submission.
